historical_fiction.title: Their Eyes Were Watching God
historical_fiction.author: Zora Neale Hurston
historical_fiction.description: Harlem Renaissance masterpiece set in early 1900s Florida. Follows Janie Crawford's journey through three marriages in Eatonville and the Everglades.

historical_fiction.title: A Land Remembered
historical_fiction.author: Patrick D. Smith
historical_fiction.description: Epic three-generation saga following the MacIvey family from 1858 to 1968. Chronicles Florida's transformation from wilderness to modern state.

historical_fiction.title: Shadow Country
historical_fiction.author: Peter Matthiessen
historical_fiction.description: National Book Award winner. Dark novel of Edgar Watson, legendary outlaw of the Everglades frontier in the early 1900s.

historical_fiction.title: The Year of the Sawdust Man
historical_fiction.author: A. LaFaye
historical_fiction.description: Young adult historical fiction set in 1930s Louisiana bayou country with strong Florida Gulf Coast connections.

true_crime.title: Florida Mayhem: True Crime from the Sunshine State
true_crime.author: Mike Miller
true_crime.description: Collection of Florida's most notorious crimes from Spanish colonial times through modern era.

true_crime.title: The Last Pirate: A Father, His Son, and the Golden Age of Marijuana Smuggling
true_crime.author: Tony Dokoupil
true_crime.description: Memoir about marijuana smuggling through Florida in the 1970s-80s. Personal story of the drug trade's impact on families.

popular_history.title: The Swamp: The Everglades, Florida, and the Politics of Paradise
popular_history.author: Michael Grunwald
popular_history.description: Pulitzer Prize-winning journalist's definitive history of the Everglades from pristine wilderness to environmental battleground.

popular_history.title: Some Kind of Paradise: A Chronicle of Man and the Land in Florida
popular_history.author: Mark Derr
popular_history.description: Environmental history examining Florida's transformation from natural paradise to developed state.

popular_history.title: Finding Florida: The True History of the Sunshine State
popular_history.author: T.D. Allman
popular_history.description: Comprehensive Florida history from Ponce de León through modern times, debunking myths and revealing complex truths.

guide_books.title: Florida Off the Beaten Path: Discover Your Fun
guide_books.author: Mike Kuhlman
guide_books.description: Guide to Florida's hidden gems and lesser-known historical sites throughout the state.

guide_books.title: Best Backroads of Florida
guide_books.author: Douglas Waitley
guide_books.description: Three-volume series covering scenic and historic routes throughout Florida with detailed maps and historical context.
